title: Establishing a commission on the status of transgender people
summary: For legislation to establish a permanent commission on the status of transgender people to conduct an ongoing study of all matters concerning transgender people, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 2725).
sponsors: Joint Committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight [Jnt]

actions.action: Reported from the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the Joint Committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
Committee recommended ought to pass and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
